metadata.description: Agent skills for taking a product from zero to one — extracting product context from a brief, triaging an unfamiliar domain, turning research into a PRD/ADR, and shipping with TDD.

plugins.name: zero-to-one
plugins.description: Zero-to-one product engineering workflow: brief-to-product-context, domain-knowledge-triage, signal-to-prd, tdd, to-prd.
